artPrompt: A carnival house of mirrors recedes vertically into infinite warped reflections, gilded frames and cracked silvered glass throwing back fractured hot-gold and sickly-neon light, false painted exits glinting in the smoky black depths. No figure, only the dizzying maze climbing the wide frame. A single lurid source flares deep within the corridor of glass, embers adrift, rendered as a moody oil painting — old-master chiaroscuro, visible impasto brushwork, deep shadow, warm varnished tones.
name: The House of Mirrors
text:
{T}: Add {B} or {R}.
{B}{R}, {T}: Flip a coin. If you win the flip, draw a card. If you lose, you walk into your own reflection and lose 1 life. Either way, you swear the floor wasn't there a second ago.
flavorText: Forty exits, thirty-nine of them painted on.
